mapper.select: /* EventPromotionMapper.getPromotionComboList */ SELECT PROMOTION_ID AS VALUE, '(' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PROMOTION_START_DATE,'YYMMDD'), 'YY.MM.DD') || '~' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PROMOTION_END_DATE,'YYMMDD'), 'YY.MM.DD') || ') ' ||PROMOTION_NAME AS TEXT FROM NMCP_EVENT_PRMT@DL_MCP WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY PROMOTION_END_DATE DESC
mapper.sql:
SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PRMT.PARTICIPATE_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PARTICIPATE_DATE, /*참여일시*/ SUB.CONTRACT_NUM, /*계약번호*/ PRMT.PROMOTION_NAME, /*프로모션명*/ PRMT.PRIZE_NAME, /*당첨결과*/ DECODE(PRMT.CERT_TYPE, '1', '휴대폰 번호') AS CERT_TYPE, /*본인인증 수단*/ PRMT.CUSTOMER_NAME, /*본인인증(이름)*/ PRMT.CERT_COMPANY, /*본인인증(통신사)*/ SUBSTR(PRMT.CTN, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(PRMT.CTN, 4, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(PRMT.CTN, 8, 4) AS CTN, /*휴대폰 번호*/ SUBSTR(PRMT.BIRTH_DATE, 3, 6) AS BIRTH_DATE, /*생년월일*/ DECODE(PRMT.GENDER, '1' , '남', '2', '여') AS GENDER, /*성별*/ PRMT.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_YN, /*개인정보 수집 이용동의*/ PRMT.MARKETING_YN, /*광고성 정보 수신 동의*/ SUB.MODEL_NAME, /*단말모델명*/ FN_GET_CODENM('RCP9005', REQ.MOVE_COMPANY) AS MOVE_COMPANY, /*이동전 통신사*/ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(REQ.REQ_IN_DAY, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REQ_IN_DAY, /*신청일자*/ TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, /*개통일자*/ FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0003', SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS SUB_STATUS, /*회선상태*/ REQ.FST_RATE_CD, /*최초요금제코드*/ REQ.FST_RATE_NM, /*최초 요금제*/ REQ.LST_RATE_CD, /*현재 요금제 코드*/ REQ.LST_RATE_NM, /*현재 요금제*/ CASE WHEN MSD.REQ_USIM_SN IS NOT NULL THEN 'M모바일(직영온라인)' ELSE FN_GET_ORGNM(PUM.ORGN_ID) END AS USIM_ORG_NM, /*유심접점*/ FN_GET_ORGNM(SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM, /*대리점*/ REQ.SHOP_NM /*판매점*/ FROM NMCP_EVENT_PRMT_JOIN_HIST@DL_MCP PRMT, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB, MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ, NMCP_USIM_BUY_TXN@DL_MCP MSD, MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST PUM WHERE PRMT.CTN = SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.ICC_ID = MSD.REQ_USIM_SN(+) AND REQ.FST_USIM_NO = PUM.USIM_NO(+) AND PRMT.PARTICIPATE_DATE BETWEEN #{srchStrtDt} || '000000' AND #{srchEndDt} || '235959'
AND PRMT.CUSTOMER_NAME = #{pSearchName} /*고객명*/
AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = #{pSearchName} /*계약번호*/
AND PRMT.CTN = #{pSearchName} /*휴대폰번호*/
AND PRMT.PROMOTION_ID = #{promotionList} /*프로모션명*/
AND PRMT.PRIZE_ID = #{prizeList} /*당첨결과*/
ORDER BY HIST_SEQ DESC
